model._hint: Base: stable-diffusion-v1-5. LoRA: SedatAl/pixel-art-LoRa, trained on jainr3/diffusiondb-pixelart dataset. ~2 GB + LoRA; no sequential offload needed.

lora._hint: 0.9 default. Lower values (0.7–0.8) soften the pixel-art effect.

generation._hint: 50 steps for crisp pixel edges. 30 is sufficient for quick tests. | CFG 7–8 works well for SD 1.5 LoRAs. | SD 1.5 native 512×512. 640×640 and 768×768 also work.

system._hint: ~2 GB peak; sequential_cpu_offload: disabled (model fits in unified memory)

notes.about: Generates pixel art and retro 16-bit style images — sprites, landscapes, characters, and icons in the aesthetic of classic video games and RPGs.
notes.prompt_guide: No trigger word needed — use descriptive pixel-art vocabulary in the prompt. Examples: 'pixel art dragon on a mountain, 16 bit', 'pixel art portrait of a knight, retro RPG style', 'pixel art city at night, 8-bit, retro game'.
